parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ portfolio_id: $json.portfolio_id, model_id: $json.model_id, symbol: $json.symbol, side: $json.side, entry_price: $json.entry_price, current_price: $json.current_price, quantity: $json.quantity, leverage: $json.leverage, stop_loss: $json.stop_loss, take_profit: $json.take_profit, unrealized_pnl: 0, status: 'OPEN', decision_id: $json.decision_id, opened_as_champion: $json.opened_as_champion || false, entry_rsi: $json.entry_rsi, entry_trend: $json.entry_trend, entry_market_state: $json.entry_market_state, entry_rsi_1h: $json.entry_rsi_1h, entry_rsi_4h: $json.entry_rsi_4h, entry_macd: $json.entry_macd, entry_macd_signal: $json.entry_macd_signal, entry_macd_histogram: $json.entry_macd_histogram, entry_bb_position: $json.entry_bb_position, entry_funding_rate: $json.entry_funding_rate, entry_oi_change: $json.entry_oi_change, entry_long_short_ratio: $json.entry_long_short_ratio, entry_volume_24h: $json.entry_volume_24h, entry_atr: $json.entry_atr, entry_ema_position: $json.entry_ema_position }) }}

={{ {chat_id: '-1003644771027', parse_mode: 'HTML', text: '📊 Position Closed ' + '🤖 Model: ' + ($json.model_name || 'Unknown') + ' ' + '📈 Side: ' + ($json.side || '-') + ' ' + '💰 P&L: $' + (parseFloat($json.pnl || 0).toFixed(2)) + ' ' + '📝 Reason: ' + ($json.close_reason || 'AI Decision')} }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ model_id: $json.model_id, balance: $json.balance, realized_pnl: $json.realized_pnl, unrealized_pnl: $json.unrealized_pnl, rank: $json.rank, recorded_at: $json.recorded_at }) }}

parameters.jsCode:
// Only pass first item to prevent multiplication
return [$input.first()];
